fields.name: trade_records
fields.description: Collection of executed trades from the investments department for risk and compliance review

children.name: trade_id
children.description: Unique identifier for the trade transaction

children.name: timestamp
children.description: Date and time when the trade was executed

children.name: trader_id
children.description: Unique identifier for the trader who executed the trade

children.name: trader_name
children.description: Full name of the trader who executed the trade

children.name: department
children.description: Originating business department

children.name: asset_class
children.description: Classification of the financial instrument traded

children.name: instrument
children.description: Description or name of the financial instrument

children.name: isin
children.description: International Securities Identification Number for the instrument; may be absent for certain derivatives

children.name: side
children.description: Direction of the trade: buy or sell

children.name: quantity
children.description: Number of units or notional amount of the instrument traded

children.name: price
children.description: Unit price or rate at which the trade was executed

children.name: settlement_currency
children.description: Currency in which the trade will be settled

children.name: trade_value
children.description: Total monetary value of the trade in the settlement currency

children.name: counterparty
children.description: Name of the external financial institution on the opposite side of the trade

children.name: counterparty_id
children.description: Unique identifier for the counterparty institution

children.name: settlement_date
children.description: Date on which the trade will be settled

children.name: trading_venue
children.description: Primary market or venue where the trade was listed or executed

children.name: execution_venue
children.description: Specific channel or method through which the trade was executed

children.name: risk_level
children.description: Risk classification assigned to the trade by the investments system

children.name: compliance_status
children.description: Current compliance review status of the trade as assessed by risk and compliance

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Contextual information and summary statistics about the trade records payload

children.name: report_date
children.description: Date on which the trade records report was generated

children.name: total_trades
children.description: Count of trade records included in this payload

children.name: total_value_usd
children.description: Aggregate monetary value of all trades in USD

children.name: source_system
children.description: Name and version of the system that generated the trade records

children.name: data_classification
children.description: Security classification level of the payload
